name: schema_version
description: Proto schema version; SDK rejects mismatches at publish.

name: account_id
description: mio UUID for the channel install. Half of the dedup key.

name: channel_type
description: Channel slug from proto/channels.yaml (e.g. zoho_cliq, slack). Cluster key.

name: conversation_kind
description: ConversationKind enum NAME (e.g. CONVERSATION_KIND_DM). Stored as string for SQL-friendliness.

name: parent_conversation_id
description: Parent conversation for thread/forum-post. Empty when not nested.

name: source_message_id
description: Platform message id. Half of the dedup key (account_id, source_message_id).

name: thread_root_message_id
description: Thread root id for Matrix-style threads. Empty otherwise.

name: sender
description: Message author identity at the platform tier. Cross-channel merge happens in MIU.

name: text
description: Message body. PII; access governed per Phase 0 Q5 (default access for now).

fields.name: bytes
fields.description: Byte count. protojson emits int64 as JSON string; BQ load coerces to INT64.

fields.name: storage_key
fields.description: Persisted object-storage key set by media-vault sidecar.

fields.name: content_sha256
fields.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of persisted bytes.

name: received_at
description: Platform-side receipt time; partition key. RFC3339 in NDJSON.

name: attributes
description: Channel-specific escape-hatch map<string,string>. Promoted to typed fields when ≥2 consumers read the same key (see CONTRIBUTING.md).

name: _ingest_at
description: Loader run timestamp (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() at MERGE time). Set by the bq-loader, not present in NDJSON.

name: _source_object
description: GCS object path the row was loaded from (_FILE_NAME pseudo-column). Set by the bq-loader.
